2604.25297.title: LegalMidm: Use-Case-Driven Legal Domain Specialization for Korean Large Language Model
2604.25297.paper_summary: In recent years, the rapid proliferation of open-source large language models (LLMs) has spurred efforts to turn general-purpose models into domain specialists. However, many domain-specialized LLMs are developed using datasets and training protocols that are not aligned with the nuanced requirements of real-world applications. In the legal domain, where precision and reliability are essential, this lack of consideration limits practical utility. In this study, we propose a systematic training framework grounded in the practical needs of the legal domain, with a focus on Korean law. We introduce LegalMidm, a Korean legal-domain LLM, and present a methodology for constructing high-quality, use-case-driven legal datasets and optimized training pipelines. Our approach emphasizes collaboration with legal professionals and rigorous data curation to ensure relevance and factual accuracy, and demonstrates effectiveness in key legal tasks.
2604.25297.paper_summary_zh: 近年來，開源大型語言模型（LLMs）的迅速增長促使將通用模型轉變為領域專家。然而，許多領域專用的LLMs是使用與現實應用的微妙需求不一致的數據集和訓練協議開發的。在法律領域，精確性和可靠性至關重要，這種缺乏考慮限制了實際效用。在本研究中，我們提出了一個基於法律領域實際需求的系統訓練框架，重點關注韓國法律。我們介紹了LegalMidm，一個韓國法律領域的LLM，並提出了一種構建高質量、以用例驅動的法律數據集和優化訓練流程的方法。我們的方法強調與法律專業人士的合作和嚴謹的數據策劃，以確保相關性和事實準確性，並在關鍵法律任務中展示了有效性。
2604.25297.author: Youngjoon Jang et.al.
2604.25297.authors: Youngjoon Jang, Chanhee Park, Hyeonseok Moon, Young-kyoung Ham, Jiwon Moon, Jinhyeon Kim, JuKyung Jung, Heuiseok Lim
